title: Mini Core collection of Sorghum.
abstract:
Global Sorghum [Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench] germplasm collections at ICRISAT genebank
Mini Core Collections
                      exceeds 37,000. A core collection (2247 accessions) was developed in 2001 to enable
Reference Set         researchers to have access to smaller set of germplasm. 
....................
